nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “No foreigner uncircumcised in heart and uncircumcised in flesh, of all the foreigners who are among the sons of Israel, shall enter My sanctuary.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: No foreigner, uncircumcised in heart and flesh, of all the foreigners who are among the people of Israel, shall enter my sanctuary.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“以色列人中一切身心都未受割禮的外族人，都不可進入我的聖所。

ccb.text: “‘因此，主耶和华说，以色列人中身心未受割礼的外族人不可进入我的圣所。
